codeReview.summary: The implementation is tightly scoped to the three TypeScript issues called out by scrutiny and correctly applies minimal, type-safe fixes: adding the missing React memo import in canvas.tsx, widening resolveNodeRendererComponent input to accept undefined in node.tsx to match getNodeDefinition return semantics, and normalizing nullable definition resolution in properties-panel.tsx. The changes align with mission constraints and do not introduce behavioral drift.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The frontend-worker skill mandates test-first for all work, but this feature is a compile-only typing/import fix where adding tests is often unnecessary overhead. The worker intentionally deviated and documented why.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: handoffs/2026-03-03T06-37-39-112Z__fix-typescript-errors-plugin-api__69a478b8-6933-4ee5-ab32-84ef86a0090f.json -> handoff.skillFeedback.deviations includes 'Frontend Worker Step 3 (Write tests first, red)' with rationale for direct type fixes.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Worker-base baseline guidance appears too rigid when missions explicitly define known pre-existing failures to ignore; this caused a documented process deviation despite correct mission adherence.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Same handoff file -> handoff.skillFeedback.deviations includes 'Worker Base Step 1.3 (Return if baseline fails)' and suggestedChanges requesting clarification for known pre-existing failures in mission AGENTS.md.
